description: Shared settings for all FuelBuddy apps (CRM, Finance Dossier, Credit Limit, Business Documents, Wallet). One section per app; add new settings under the relevant app's section.

fields.description: When enabled, contract Sales Orders created from a Quotation (on Quotation submit and by the monthly scheduler) are submitted automatically on creation. When disabled, they are left in Draft for manual review/approval. Independent of "Enable Manual Sales Order Creation".
fields.label: Submit Sales Order on Creation

fields.description: When enabled, a Sales Order may be created directly/manually (e.g. from Selling > Sales Order) without going through the Opportunity -> Quotation -> Finance Dossier chain. Automatic creation on Quotation submit (and the monthly scheduler) keeps working regardless. When disabled, every Sales Order must originate from an approved Quotation (BUG-012 guard).
fields.label: Enable Manual Sales Order Creation

fields.description: When enabled, a Credit Limit record is created for each non-cash-advance customer (on onboarding and from the Finance Dossier), and Delivery Notes are blocked when the customer is overdue or over their limit. When disabled, no records are created and Delivery Notes are not blocked on credit.
fields.label: Enable Credit Limit

fields.description: When enabled, a Wallet is created for each new Cash-advance customer and Delivery Notes are blocked when they would push the customer's wallet balance below zero. When disabled, no wallets are created and Delivery Notes are not blocked on wallet balance.
fields.label: Enable Wallet

name: Fuelbuddy Settings
